title: astragalus angustiflorus subsp. hellenicus
intro: Astragalus angustiflorus subsp. hellenicus, also known as Hellenic milkvetch, is a subspecies of perennial legume native to Greece. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hellenic milkvetch include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Hellenic milkvetch can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
